objective: Adversarial analysis of the orchestrator loop to identify every assumption that could fail

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: extract_z3_spec() can return None, but code assumes it exists
vulnerabilities.assumption: Bob will always generate valid Z3 spec
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Silent failure - z3_spec=None passed to verify_math(), causing downstream errors
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Bob returns malformed SMT2 or plain text instead of valid spec
vulnerabilities.impact: Math verification receives None, crashes or returns meaningless results

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: extract_game_model() can return None, but code assumes it exists
vulnerabilities.assumption: Bob will always generate valid game theory JSON
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: game_model=None passed to verify_game_theory(), causing crash
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Bob returns invalid JSON, text explanation, or empty response
vulnerabilities.impact: Game theory verification crashes with NoneType errors

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: extract_patch() can return None, no validation before use
vulnerabilities.assumption: Bob will always generate valid patch JSON
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: patch=None yielded to client, no retry logic
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Bob returns explanation instead of JSON patch
vulnerabilities.impact: Patch stage fails silently, loop continues without fix

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: Assumes all math_results values have 'status' key
vulnerabilities.assumption: verify_math() always returns dict with 'status' field
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: KeyError or AttributeError if result is malformed
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Exception in math framework returns error dict without 'status'
vulnerabilities.impact: Orchestrator crashes during result aggregation

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: Assumes all game_results values have 'status' key
vulnerabilities.assumption: verify_game_theory() always returns dict with 'status' field
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: KeyError if result is malformed or empty dict
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Exception in game framework returns error dict without 'status'
vulnerabilities.impact: Orchestrator crashes during result aggregation

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: game_results can be empty dict if game_model is None
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: all() on empty dict returns True, false positive
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Bob fails to generate game model, empty dict passes verification
vulnerabilities.impact: Loop reports success when game theory was never verified

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: run_bob() can return dict without 'stdout' key on error
vulnerabilities.assumption: run_bob() always returns dict with 'stdout' field
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: KeyError when accessing result.get('stdout', '')
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Bob CLI not found, timeout, or crash
vulnerabilities.impact: Orchestrator crashes on first Bob call

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: No validation of repo_result['success'] before proceeding
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Loop continues even if Bob failed to analyze repo
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Bob crashes or times out on repo analysis
vulnerabilities.impact: Subsequent stages work with empty/invalid context

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: JSON parsing doesn't validate structure, only syntax
vulnerabilities.assumption: Valid JSON syntax means valid game model
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Malformed game model passes parse() but fails in frameworks
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Bob returns {"random": "data"} as valid JSON
vulnerabilities.impact: Game frameworks crash with missing required fields

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: SMT2 detection uses regex, doesn't validate completeness
vulnerabilities.assumption: Presence of SMT2 keywords means valid spec
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Incomplete SMT2 marked as valid=True
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Bob returns partial SMT2 with (declare-fun but no (check-sat)
vulnerabilities.impact: Z3 receives invalid spec, returns 'unknown' or crashes

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: No validation that game_model contains required fields
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: KeyError or empty list/dict operations
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Bob returns minimal JSON: {"players": []}
vulnerabilities.impact: Nash framework crashes with index errors

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: Assumes players are strings or dicts with 'id', no validation
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: TypeError if player is int, list, or None
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Bob returns {"players": [null, 123]}
vulnerabilities.impact: Framework crashes extracting player IDs

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: No validation that payoff_matrix has all strategy combinations
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: KeyError when accessing missing strategy combination
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Bob returns incomplete payoff matrix
vulnerabilities.impact: Framework crashes building numpy arrays

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: Assumes payoffs are 2-element lists, no validation
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: IndexError if payoff is single value or empty
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Bob returns payoffs as single numbers: {"s1": {"s2": 5}}
vulnerabilities.impact: Framework crashes with index out of range

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: verify_all() doesn't validate z3_spec before passing to AlgebraicFramework
vulnerabilities.assumption: z3_spec is valid SMT2 string or None
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Empty string "" passed to Z3, returns unexpected output
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Orchestrator passes empty string instead of None
vulnerabilities.impact: Z3 verification returns confusing results

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: DifferentialFramework assumes spec has 'function' key
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Returns failed status but continues
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Config passed without differential_spec
vulnerabilities.impact: Differential verification always fails

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: No validation that Z3 is installed before execution
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: FileNotFoundError caught but returns generic failed status
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Z3 not installed or wrong PATH
vulnerabilities.impact: All algebraic verifications fail silently

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: Z3 output parsing assumes specific format
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Returns 'failed' for unexpected output
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Z3 version mismatch returns different format
vulnerabilities.impact: Valid specs marked as failed

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: asyncio.gather with return_exceptions=True masks failures
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Exception object passed as result, isinstance() check fails
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Framework raises unexpected exception type
vulnerabilities.impact: Orchestrator receives Exception object instead of result dict

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: Same as V019 - asyncio.gather exception handling
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Exception object passed as result
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Framework raises unexpected exception type
vulnerabilities.impact: Orchestrator receives Exception object instead of result dict

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: Assumes player_data is in players list for index lookup
vulnerabilities.assumption: player_data object identity matches list membership
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: ValueError if player_data not in list
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Player objects reconstructed, identity check fails
vulnerabilities.impact: Mechanism design verification crashes

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: Division by (1 - discount_factor) when discount_factor=1
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: ZeroDivisionError
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Config sets discount_factor=1.0
vulnerabilities.impact: Repeated games verification crashes

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: Assumes payoff_matrix has nested structure for all strategies
vulnerabilities.assumption: All strategy combinations exist in matrix
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: KeyError when accessing missing combination
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Incomplete payoff matrix from Bob
vulnerabilities.impact: ESS verification crashes

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: Division by zero when calculating CVaR with empty tail_losses
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Returns var instead of crashing, but logic is wrong
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: All final values above VaR threshold
vulnerabilities.impact: CVaR calculation incorrect

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: Division by zero when total_liabilities=0
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Returns float('inf'), but this might not be handled correctly
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Contract with no liabilities
vulnerabilities.impact: Solvency ratio infinity might pass checks incorrectly

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: No validation that 'bob' command exists before execution
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: FileNotFoundError caught but result dict incomplete
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Bob not installed
vulnerabilities.impact: All Bob calls fail, orchestrator continues with empty results

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: JSON parsing of stdout is optional, no schema validation
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Parsed JSON doesn't match expected structure
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Bob returns valid JSON with wrong schema
vulnerabilities.impact: Downstream code crashes accessing missing fields

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: Failures dict construction assumes .items() exists
vulnerabilities.assumption: math_results and game_results are always dicts
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: AttributeError if results are None or other type
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: verify_math() returns None on catastrophic failure
vulnerabilities.impact: Patch generation stage crashes

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: _run_math_verification() doesn't validate z3_spec type
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: verify_math() receives unexpected type
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: extract_z3_spec() returns dict or list instead of string
vulnerabilities.impact: Math verification crashes with type errors

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: No error handling for session file write
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Unhandled exception if disk full or permissions issue
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Disk full or read-only filesystem
vulnerabilities.impact: Bob execution crashes instead of returning result

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: VerificationResult is dataclass but never used in code
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Frameworks return plain dicts, no type checking
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Framework returns dict missing required fields
vulnerabilities.impact: No compile-time or runtime type validation

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: No error handling for verification log file write
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Unhandled exception at end of verification
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Disk full during final log write
vulnerabilities.impact: Verification completes but crashes before returning results

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: extract_game_model() returns first matching nested dict
vulnerabilities.assumption: First match is the correct game model
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Returns wrong nested object if multiple matches
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Bob returns JSON with multiple game-like structures
vulnerabilities.impact: Wrong data passed to game theory verification

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: extract_patch() returns first matching nested dict
vulnerabilities.assumption: First match is the correct patch
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Returns wrong nested object if multiple matches
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Bob returns JSON with multiple patch-like structures
vulnerabilities.impact: Wrong patch applied or patch stage fails

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: Numpy array creation with zeros, no validation of dimensions
vulnerabilities.assumption: n_strategies_1 and n_strategies_2 are positive integers
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Empty array if strategies list is empty
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Bob returns empty strategies dict
vulnerabilities.impact: Nash equilibrium calculation on empty matrix

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: np.mean() on empty list returns nan
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: nan propagates through calculations
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Empty payoff lists due to missing matrix entries
vulnerabilities.impact: Advantage calculations return nan, comparisons fail

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: No timeout on asyncio.to_thread(run_bob, ...)
vulnerabilities.assumption: Bob always completes within subprocess timeout
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Orchestrator hangs if Bob subprocess hangs
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Bob enters infinite loop or deadlock
vulnerabilities.impact: Entire verification pipeline hangs indefinitely

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: Generic exception handler catches all errors
vulnerabilities.assumption: All exceptions can be handled the same way
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: Loses specific error information
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Any unexpected exception
vulnerabilities.impact: Debugging impossible, only generic error message

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: Config dict accessed without validation
vulnerabilities.assumption: Config has expected keys if provided
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: KeyError if config has wrong structure
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Orchestrator passes malformed config
vulnerabilities.impact: Math verification crashes

vulnerabilities.vulnerability: Config.get() with defaults, but no type validation
vulnerabilities.failure_mode: TypeError if discount_factor is string
vulnerabilities.attack_vector: Config with wrong value types
vulnerabilities.impact: Repeated games verification crashes
